item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Black Mage's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned black mage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level black mage to 70 and complete all job quests up through “One Golem to Rule Them All.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
